title: The Cannon Threatens the Town
description: On pages 16–19, this part begins the Orange Town storyline, where Nami’s schemes and Buggy’s crew pull Luffy and Zoro into a new conflict.
scene: Orange Town becomes the stage for Nami’s schemes, Buggy’s violence, and Luffy’s refusal to act like a normal pirate.

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: I'll just let you take care of those guys!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: We've got her boss right here!

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: He's a bigger prize than she is!

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: THAT MAP belongs to THE FEARSOME PIRATE, BUGGY THE CLOWN!!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: YOU BEAT THOSE SABER- SWINGERS WITH YOUR BARE HANDS!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: When you call me, and we are not

summary: The Orange Town conflict mixes Nami’s suspicious cleverness with Buggy’s theatrical cruelty. The section builds the unstable alliance that will oppose Buggy’s crew.
